pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target remain at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version supporting Java 21 and switch to release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not support Java 21 language features or bytecode generation correctly.
